companyOverview.title: Company Overview
companyOverview.description: Zar Ventures is a diversified real estate investment, development, management and project execution company specializing in joint ventures with RERA registered developers, large project owners and landowners. We partner with reputed builders to unlock project value through structured capital engineering oversights.

sections.title: JV Structuring & Capital Participation
items: Capital infusion at land approvals construction or sales stage

sections.title: Development Management (DM)
items: Feasibility, project planning and DPR preparation
RERA registration online procurement and cost monitoring

sections.title: Sales Marketing and CRM Operations
items: Project branding launch strategy & Digital marketing
Inventory mapping, pricing strategy and collection management

sections.title: Land Regulatory Support
items: Liaison for NOCs, approvals & authority coordination
